privileged_info_summary: CRITICAL: The task.json file is malformed and truncated, with no metadata field. Therefore, no metadata claims can be verified. However, the system does use real data: Aerobridge is an open-source Django-based drone fleet management system from https://github.com/openskies-sh/aerobridge (archived December 2023, BSL-licensed). The system uses SQLite database at /opt/aerobridge/aerobridge.sqlite3 with official Aerobridge sample fixture data. Admin credentials are admin/adminpass123, and the Django server runs on http://localhost:8000. The task requires creating a health-check bash script that generates a JSON report of database record counts, server status, database file size, and disk space.
